name: Self-Improving flatmachines_cli — coding machine with experiment loop

description: Baseline: 10/100 — only self-contained checks pass (no HyperAgents/pi-autoresearch deps). No experiment tracking, no self-improve config, no improve module yet.

description: Full self-improvement infrastructure: experiment.py (tracker with run/log/metrics/archive/noise_floor), improve.py (SelfImprover + SelfImproveHooks), self_improve.yml machine config, CLI/REPL integration, 59 new tests. Score 10→100.

asi.hypothesis: Build complete self-improvement infrastructure in one shot: experiment tracking + improve orchestration + machine config + CLI integration + tests
asi.new_files: experiment.py (430L), improve.py (240L), config/self_improve.yml, test_experiment.py (37 tests), test_improve.py (24 tests)
asi.architecture: ExperimentTracker handles run/log/metrics/persist, SelfImprover wraps tracker with evaluate/benchmark, SelfImproveHooks bridges to FlatMachine actions
